prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9b30e358`.
codex_response:
Implemented `9b30e358` as a new ARC2 task package. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b30e358/verifier.py#L4) extracts the contiguous non-background bottom block, half-rotates its row order only when the block height is even, and tiles that block to the full grid height. I used the summary hint because it matched all official examples; no `notes.md` or new shared primitive was needed.

The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b30e358/generator.py#L133) keeps the task family tight: fixed 10-row grids, a uniform top background section, and small 4-row/5-row bottom motifs drawn from a compact library of staircase and cross-like row patterns with randomized colors, mirroring, offsets, and width `5` or `7`. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b30e358/__init__.py#L1).

Validation passed: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked on-distribution. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b30e358/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b30e358/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b30e358/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b30e358/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b30e358/previews/preview_03.png).
